correct_ceds_definition: A human readable name used to identify the data within the collection.

sif_description: Summarized amount.
correct_ceds_definition: The annual sum of payments given to staff in addition to their regular wages.
predicted_ceds_definition: The total amount institutions estimate that undergraduate-level full-time, first-time degree-seeking students will pay to attend before financial aid is considered. This price includes tuition and fees, books and supplies, room and board, and certain other designated expenses such as transportation. These estimates are the average amounts used by the financial aid office to determine a studentís financial aid.
